tell me about ayushman?:
Ayushman Anupam is a Data Science student who is passionate about building data-driven systems and exploring the applications of mathematics, statistics, and AI to real-world problems. His academic background in mathematics has led to a strong interest in Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, Graph Theory, and Agentic AI systems. Recently, he has been focusing on quantitative finance, including time series modeling, portfolio optimization, and statistical arbitrage.

Here's a summary of Ayushman's background from the resume:

*   **Education:**
    *   Currently pursuing an M.Sc in Data Science at Chennai Mathematical Institute (2024 - Present) with a CGPA of 9.19. Key subjects include Python, Probability and Statistics with R, Mathematical Analysis, and Data Mining and Machine Learning.
    *   Completed a BMaths. (Hons.) from Indian Statistical Institute (2020 - 2024), where he studied Probability, Statistics, R, Graph Theory, Optimization, and Linear Algebra.

*   **Experience & Internships:**
    *   **Industry Project - Trading Strategy Researcher** at Chennai Mathematical Institute under Prantik Biswas (Quantitative Investment Strategist at HSBC), from August 2025 - November 2025. He focused on quantitative trading research for Indian equity markets, including LSTM for price prediction, identifying support/resistance levels, and portfolio optimization.
    *   **AI Agent Development Intern** at Algo Labs, from May 2025 - July 2025. He developed an Agentic-AI framework called "Lecture-AI" using LangGraph and RAG pipelines for interactive learning experiences.
    *   **Data Scientist Intern** at COTHON SOLUTIONS in December 2024. He worked on customer segmentation (K-Means), e-commerce recommendation systems (Content-Based and Collaborative Filtering), and heart risk assessment models.
    *   **Finance and Stock Market Internship - Trainee** at CAPITAL VISION INVESTMENT, from November 2024 - December 2024. Gained practical experience in financial investment strategies, portfolio management, risk assessment, and equity selection.

*   **Skills:**
    *   **Artificial Intelligence & LLM Systems:** Transformers, LLMs, AI Agents, Agentic AI, RAG, LangChain, LangGraph, Vector Databases.
    *   **Programming & Technical Tools:** Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Plotly), R, SQL, LaTeX.
    *   **Quantitative Finance:** Statistical Arbitrage, Portfolio Optimization, Credit & Market Risk Modeling, Financial Econometrics, Equity Analysis, Scenario Analysis.
    *   **Machine Learning & Deep Learning:** Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Recommendation Systems, ANN, CNN, PyTorch, TensorFlow.
    *   **MLOps & ML Systems:** DVC, MLflow, Model Deployment, Experiment Tracking, Flask, Docker.
    *   **Data Analytics & Visualization:** EDA, Statistical Analysis, Data Visualization, Pandas, Plotly, Tableau, Power BI.

*   **Selected Projects:**
    *   **"Z-Score Alpha – Statistical Arbitrage Strategy"**: Developing a quantitative trading research project using Z-score based signals (March 2026 - Present). GitHub: https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Z-Score_Alpha-Statistical_Arbitrage_Strategy
    *   **"Applied Machine Learning (AML) – Projects"**: Focused on the full ML workflow from model development to deployment, including spam detection, DVC, Flask, and Docker (January 2026 - Present). GitHub: https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Applied_Machine_Learning
    *   **"LectureAI - your personal AI tutor"**: An agentic AI solution for interactive learning from video content, developed using Python, Django, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, and LLM APIs (May 2025 - July 2025). GitHub: https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/LectureAI-Agentic-AI_freamework
    *   **"Streamlit Portfolio Website with Agentic AI Assistant"**: Designed a responsive portfolio with an integrated Agentic AI assistant (ResAgent) using Python, Streamlit, and Gemini API (June 2025). GitHub: https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/APortfolio | Website: https://ayushmanportfolio.streamlit.app/
    *   **"Heartbeat Sentinel - Predicting Heart Failure"**: Developed and deployed ML models (Random Forest, XGBoost) with 90% accuracy for heart failure prediction using Streamlit (November 2024). GitHub: https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Heartbeat-Sentinel_Decoding-and-Predicting-Heart-Failure | Streamlit App: https://heartbeatsentineldecodingandpredictingheartfailure.streamlit.app/

Ayushman also has a portfolio website at https://ayushmanportfolio.streamlit.app/, a LinkedIn profile at https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayushman-anupam/, and a GitHub profile at https://github.com/AyushmanGHub.

show me ayushman's latest projects:
Ayushman Anupam's latest project is "Z-Score Alpha – Statistical Arbitrage Strategy."

*   **Project Name:** Z-Score Alpha – Statistical Arbitrage Strategy
    *   **Date:** March 2026 - Present
    *   **Summary:** This quantitative trading research project focuses on statistical arbitrage using Z-score based signals derived from financial time series data. It aims to identify short-term mean-reversion opportunities in market prices by standardizing price deviations from historical behavior and generating trading signals based on statistical thresholds. The workflow includes data understanding, financial time-series preprocessing, signal generation, and backtesting to evaluate performance under different market conditions, emphasizing a clean and reproducible data pipeline.
    *   **Skills and Technologies used:** Quantitative Finance, Statistical Arbitrage, Z-Score Analysis, Time Series Analysis, Data Cleaning, Financial Data Processing
    *   **GitHub Link:** https://github.com/AyushmanGHub/Z-Score_Alpha-Statistical_Arbitrage_Strategy

tell me about his lastest work experienc:
Ayushman Anupam's latest work experience is an Industry Project as a **Trading Strategy Researcher** at the Chennai Mathematical Institute, under the supervision of Prantik Biswas, a Quantitative Investment Strategist (AVP) at HSBC.

*   **Duration:** August 2025 - November 2025
*   **About the Project:**
    *   This project focused on quantitative trading research for Indian equity markets, developing data-driven methods for short-term market analysis and portfolio decision-making using machine learning and statistical techniques.
    *   Key research components included:
        *   Developing time-series forecasting models using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks to predict short-term price movements of major indices and NIFTY 50 stocks.
        *   Creating algorithms to identify technical support and resistance levels from historical price data by analyzing local extrema and clustering significant price points.
        *   Extending asset-level predictions to portfolio construction by implementing a portfolio optimization framework, where predicted returns were used as expected returns, and risk was dynamically estimated using rolling covariance matrices. Mean-variance optimization was applied to construct portfolios maximizing the Sharpe ratio.
*   **Skills and Technologies Learned:** Quantitative Finance, Time Series Forecasting, LSTM, XGBoost, Portfolio Optimization, Mean-Variance Optimization, Sharpe Ratio Analysis, Financial Data Analysis.
